title: AI tool and runtime UI command delivery
goal: Expose ui.open_right_panel to the AI runtime and deliver safe UI commands to browser chat clients.
requirements: Add ui.open_right_panel as a read/UI-state tool, not a business write tool.
Inputs: source_code, object_type, object_id and optional mode=view.
Tool must call RightPanelProvider registry and return a ui_command descriptor.
Tool audit must store safe identifiers only.
Agent prompt must say to use the tool only when the user asks to open/show an object in the interface.
Full-page chat client must execute ui_command results.
Sidebar chat client must execute ui_command results.
Streaming and non-streaming responses must both handle UI command delivery or clearly choose one supported path for MVP.
acceptance: Tool call for visible object returns ok and a command.
Tool call for denied object returns ok=false or safe denial without opening.
Browser executes command and opens the global drawer.
Existing write confirmation flow is unchanged.
